THEVOID-STRIKE_THE_VOID.title: Strike
THEVOID-DEFEND_THE_VOID.title: Defend
THEVOID-HOLLOW_STRIKE.title: Hollow Strike
THEVOID-VOID_SLASH.title: Void Slash
THEVOID-BLIND_SIDE.title: Blind Side
THEVOID-VOID_DRAIN.title: Void Drain
THEVOID-CONSUMING_BLOW.title: Consuming Blow
THEVOID-GOUGED_EYES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If you have [gold]Blind[/gold] deal {BlindedDamage:diff()} instead.
THEVOID-GOUGED_EYES.title: Gouged Eyes
THEVOID-VOID_TAP.title: Void Tap
THEVOID-UNRAVEL.title: Unravel
THEVOID-DARKEN.title: Darken
THEVOID-VOID_SHROUD.title: Void Shroud
THEVOID-WITHER.title: Wither
THEVOID-DARK_TOUCH.title: Dark Touch
THEVOID-FADE.description: At the start of each turn gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] and apply [blue]{FadePower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] to yourself.
THEVOID-FADE.title: Fade
THEVOID-VOID_SIGHT.title: Void Sight
THEVOID-DEVOUR.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If enemy is below {TargetSelected:{InstantDeath:diff()}|{InstantDeath:diff()}%} HP, kill instantly instead. Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
THEVOID-DEVOUR.title: Devour
THEVOID-BLOOD_RITE.title: Blood Rite
THEVOID-ECLIPSE_STRIKE.title: Eclipse Strike
THEVOID-HEMORRHAGE.title: Hemorrhage
THEVOID-BLIND_FURY.description: Deal {BlindFury:diff()} damage. Deal an additional {AdditionalDamage:diff()} damage per [blue]{BlindPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] stacks applied to yourself.
THEVOID-BLIND_FURY.title: Blind Fury
THEVOID-VOID_OFFERING.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your hand. Apply [blue]{VoidMendPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Void Mend[/gold].
THEVOID-VOID_OFFERING.title: Void Offering
THEVOID-VOID_PACT.description:
Lose HP equal to {PercentDamage:diff()}% of your max HP. Gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
THEVOID-VOID_PACT.title: Void Pact
THEVOID-NULL_STEP.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {AdditionalBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for every {BlindPower:diff()} [gold]Blind[/gold] stacks on the enemy.
THEVOID-NULL_STEP.title: Null Step
THEVOID-ECLIPSE.title: Eclipse
THEVOID-VOID_ASCENDANT.description: At the start of each turn, apply [blue]{VoidMendPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Void Mend[/gold] to ALL enemies. Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] for every [blue]{BlindPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] stacks on ALL enemies.
THEVOID-VOID_ASCENDANT.title: Void Ascendant
THEVOID-ABYSSAL_GAZE.description: Whenever an enemy dies, apply [blue]{BlindPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Blind[/gold] to all remaining enemies.
THEVOID-ABYSSAL_GAZE.title: Abyssal Gaze
